substrate_line: ADNI UCSF Cross-Sectional FreeSurfer 7.x structural features (weight-free feeder) + plasma p-tau217/GFAP/NfL
note: Real ADNI (gated), assembled from raw LONI tables (build_adni_contract.py). Multi-site with real plasma p-tau217 — the biomarker anchor no open cohort ships. The 3T/1.5T split dominates the full cohort (SURVIVOR restricts to 3T).
